subcodes.first_line: O thou sincere servant of the Abha Beauty! Plato, the renowned philosopher, was a physician of the body and a human personality, but when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی افلاطون شهیر طبیب جسمانی بود و شخصی انسانی ولی چون
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
